findings.description: The HTML nests a second <main> inside the first, creating duplicated structural wrappers that do not correspond to the PDF structure.
findings.evidence: HTML shows '<main><main> ... </main></main>'. The PDF is a simple 3-page flyer with no duplicated structural container.

findings.description: One date line contains a text accuracy error: 'forward' should be 'forwarded'.
findings.evidence: PDF: '4/19/22 – Resumes will be forward to Hiring Managers'. HTML: '4/19/22 – Resumes will be forward to Hiring Managers'. This appears to match the PDF exactly, so no actual fidelity issue should be flagged; however, there are no substantive text mismatches elsewhere.
